name: ME4 YouTube
description: YouTube content extraction service — fetches metadata, transcripts and comments, and downloads video, audio and subtitles via yt-dlp. The buttons, pipeline, functions and greeting are all defined by the service itself via /api/manifest — this file is only a seed that tells the Baustein where to reach the service.
subtitle: YouTube-Metadaten, Transkripte, Downloads
_comment_version: Service version mirror (5. Versions-Spiegelort per BPSpec .spec/offen/me4-ui-service-owned-interaction-v1-audit-2026-07-12.md §„Version-Bump-Spiegelorte“, AD-6 / me4-versioning-rule). Must be kept in sync with pyproject.toml, app/__init__.py (__version__), app/config.py (settings.service_version) and CHANGELOG.md on every PATCH bump.
_comment_apiKey: To authenticate proxied requests when ME4-S-youtube runs with API_KEY set, add: "apiKey": "<read from Secret-Manager>". The Baustein forwards this as X-API-Key header on every proxied request. Falls back to process.env.SERVICE_API_KEY if omitted. NEVER commit a real key — leave undefined in version control.
